description_long: This object is a rectangular chessboard with a classic 8x8 grid of alternating black and marbled white squares. The surface is flat and smooth, with each square appearing evenly sized and sharply delineated. The marbled white squares have a cloudy, stone-like texture, while the black squares are solid and deep in color, giving the board a sophisticated, high-contrast appearance. The sides of the board are vertically aligned and display the same checkered pattern as the top, suggesting the board is constructed from a single solid material or is fully wrapped in the patterned finish. The border is flush with the playing surface, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or raised edges. The overall look is modern and minimalistic, suitable for public parks, urban plazas, or recreational spaces.
description: A rectangular chessboard with an 8x8 grid of alternating black and marbled white squares, featuring a smooth, modern, and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: The chessboard is seen from the front, showing the full checkered surface and the patterned edge facing the viewer.
description_view_1: The board is viewed from a slight angle, revealing the checkered pattern on both the top and the left side edge.
description_view_2: This view shows the board from the opposite side, with the right edge and top surface both displaying the checkered pattern.
description_view_3: The chessboard is seen from the back, with the rear edge and top surface visible, both featuring the same checkered design.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular grid of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 pattern, with alternating black and marbled white squares. Each square is perfectly square-shaped, and the marbled white squares have a cloudy, stone-like appearance, while the black squares are solid. The pattern is clean and geometric, with no decorative elements or markings.
attribute_border_design: The border is flush with the playing surface and continues the checkered pattern seamlessly onto the vertical sides. There is no visible ornamentation, inscription, or raised edge; the border is simple and unadorned, matching the modern, minimalistic style of the board.
